timeline.title: Andhra Pradesh SCERT Social Studies History Timeline

topics.topic_name: 12. The Kakatiyas – Emergence of a Regional Kingdom

topics.chapter_name: Theme III: Political Systems and Governance
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Need to protect Hindu kingdoms from Deccan sultanates. Effect: Flourishing of art, architecture, trade and culture.

topics.subtopic_name: Establishment and expansion of the Mughal Empire
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Babur's conquest and political ambition. Effect: Unification of large parts of India under a central authority.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Economic exploitation and desire for self-rule. Effect: Rise of nationalism and formation of INC.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Jallianwala Bagh, Khilafat issue, desire for independence. Effect: Mass movements, Quit India, Independence.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Desire for independence from Nizam and British. Effect: Integration of Hyderabad State into India.

topics.subtopic_name: Understanding law and justice through case studies
Abolition of Zamindari system in India
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Exploitation by zamindars and land inequality. Effect: Land reforms, redistribution of land to peasants.

topics.subtopic_name: Reform movements in 19th and 20th century India
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Social evils and need for reform. Effect: Abolition of Sati, widow remarriage, women's education.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Technological innovations. Effect: Urbanization, social changes, rise of working class.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Colonial oppression and desire for self-rule. Effect: Decolonization, formation of new nations.

topics.subtopic_name: Final phase of Indian freedom struggle
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Quit India Movement, WWII, British fatigue. Effect: Independence, Partition of India.

topics.topic_name: 14. National Movement in India – Partition & Independence 1939-1947
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Mountbatten Plan and religious division. Effect: Mass migration, communal violence, India-Pakistan hostility.

topics.cause_effect: Cause: Need for a governing framework. Effect: Establishment of democratic republic, fundamental rights.

topics.topic_name: 21. The Movement for the Formation of Telangana State
topics.cause_effect: Cause: Distinct social profile, regional aspirations, and demand for separate statehood. Effect: Formation of Telangana state on 2 June 2014.
